message:
fix: correct orphans test to check stats.total_commits instead of top-level total_commits

The robot-orphans output nests total_commits inside a stats object (OrphanReport
has stats: OrphanStats, not flattened). The test was asserting json["total_commits"]
which is always null, causing the test to always fail. Fixed to use
json["stats"]["total_commits"].

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
